channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Netflix’s ‘Frankenstein’ wins three Oscars, ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ wins two
item.description: “Frankenstein” won for Best Production Design, Best Costume Design, and Best Makeup and Hairstyling, while “KPop Demon Hunters” won for Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song.

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2026 live coverage: All the news and updates as it happens
item.description: We're live in San Jose for Nvidia GTC 2026 - here's what we've seen so far.

item.title: Killing Vampires Pays Off as Michael B. Jordan Wins Best Actor for ‘Sinners’
item.description: Ryan Coogler's film was nominated for a record 16 Oscars, including Best Director and Best Picture.

item.title: Samsung SDI secures $1b ESS battery supply deal in US
item.description: The firm said it is boosting its US presence amid rising ESS demand and is in talks with multiple global customers.

item.title: These funds have not invested in SEA in the past year
item.description: Pitching your startup to an investor? First, check if they’re still active in your market.

item.title: Indian EV charging startup Rebolt installs chargers at RBI campus
item.description: Rebolt, a Bengaluru-based company that operates community EV charging stations, said it supplied and installed the chargers.

item.title: Like a truffle pig for deals, I've sniffed out the top 55+ discounts in Amazon's new Big Smile Sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Smile Sale began on Monday, March 16 and runs till March 22 — save on smart home devices, phones, tablets, headphones, cameras and more.

item.title: Samsung exec: AI will reshape every aspect of life
item.description: He said organizations beyond IT such as medicine, law, and HR must prepare for widespread change.

item.title: JD.com launches Joybuy in Europe to rival Amazon
item.description: The launch follows JD.com agreeing last year to buy German electronics retailer Ceconomy.

item.title: Indian home service startup Snabbit said to raise about $50m
item.description: US-based Susquehanna International Group - described by one person as a new investor - and existing investor Lightspeed are also expected to join the round, the sources said.

item.title: BYD denies using Thai EV plant to evade US tariffs
item.description: The probe examines structural excess capacity across China, the EU, and ASEAN, and is also scrutinising shifts in final assembly to Southeast Asia.

item.title: The pivot that took WhyQ from high burn to net profit
item.description: WhyQ beat the delivery burn by ditching B2C. Look into the playbook of the firm’s path to profit and the AI-powered strategy to scale its B2B business

item.title: Indian edtech startup upGrad in 100% share swap for Unacademy
item.description: Unacademy's valuation fell below US$500 million from a 2021 peak of US$3.5 billion.

item.title: SK hynix 2025 profit soars, surpasses Samsung on AI boom
item.description: SK hynix posted a record operating profit of 47.2 trillion won (US$31.59 billion) in 2025, it beat Samsung Electronics.

item.title: The best red carpet looks at the 2026 Oscars, according to the internet
item.description: All of the best looks from the 2026 Oscars red carpet.
